title: G.S.R. 105(E): These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) (Second Amendment) Rules, 2015.
description: G.S.R. 105(E): These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) (Second Amendment) Rules, 2015.

(1) इन िनयम犘 का संि楹玅 नाम पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) (दूसरा संशोधन) िनयम, 2015 है । (2) ये िनयम राजप灴 म犆 灹काशन क琉 तारीख को 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे । 2. पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) िनयम, 1986 क琉 अनुसूची 1 म犆 “जेनरेटर सेट (जेन सेट) के िलए 800 琈कलोवाट तक के नए डीजल इंजन के िलए लागू उ瀄सज榁न सीमा" से संबंिधत 灙म सं榐यांक 95 म犆,— (क) आरंिभक पैरा म犆, 'एक जनवरी, 2015’ श瀑द犘, अंक犘 और अ楹र犘 के 瀡थान पर '1 मई, 2015’ श瀑द犘, अंक犘 और अ楹र犘 को रखा जाएगा ; (ख) साधारण शत猀 के '灹माणन क琉 अपे楹ा' से संबंिधत पैरा 2 म犆,— (i) "एक जनवरी, 2015" श瀑द犘, अंक犘 और अ楹र犘 के 瀡थान पर "1 मई, 2015" श瀑द犘, अंक犘 और अ楹र犘 को रखा जाएगा ; (ii) "1 जनवरी, 2016" श瀑द犘, अंक犘 और अ楹र犘 के 瀡थान पर "1 मई, 2016" श瀑द犘, अंक犘 और अ楹र犘 को रखा जाएगा ; [फा. सं. 榉यू-15017/08/2012-सीपीड瀑瀖यू] डॉ. रािशद हसन, सलाहकार -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण :::: मूल िनयम भारत के राजप灴 म犆 सं榐याक का.आ. 844(अ) तारीख 19 नवंबर, 1986 獧ारा 灹कािशत 琈कए गए थे, और अिधसूचना सं榐यांक犘 का.आ. 433(अ) तारीख 18 अ灹ैल, 1987; सा.का.िन. 01(अ), तारीख 1 जनवरी, 2010; सा.का.िन. 215(अ), तारीख 15 माच榁, 2011; सा.का.िन. 221(अ), तारीख 18 माच榁, 2011; सा.का.िन. 354(अ), तारीख 2 मई, 2011; सा.का.िन. 424(अ), तारीख 1 जून, 2011; सा.का.िन. 446(अ), तारीख 13 जून, 2011; सा.का.िन. 152(अ), तारीख 16 माच榁, 2012; सा.का.िन. 266(अ), तारीख 30 माच榁, 2012; सा.का.िन. 277(अ), तारीख 31 माच榁, 2012; सा.का.िन. 820(अ), तारीख 9 नवंबर, 2012; सा.का.िन. 176(अ), तारीख 18 माच榁, 2013; सा.का.िन. 535(अ), तारीख 7 अग瀡त, 2013; सा.का.िन. 771(अ), तारीख 11 琈दसंबर, 2013; सा.का.िन. 2(अ), तारीख 2 जनवरी, 2014; सा.का.िन. 229(अ), तारीख 28 माच榁, 2014; सा.का.िन. 262(अ), तारीख 31 माच榁, 2014; सा.का.िन. 612(अ), तारीख 28 अग瀡त, 2014; सा.का.िन. 789(अ), तारीख 11 नवंबर, 2014 और सा.का.िन. 54(अ), तारीख 23 जनवरी, 2015 獧ारा प玑ातवत牸 संशोधन 琈कया गया । MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17 February, 2015 G.S.R. 105(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 6 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) (Second Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, in Schedule I, in serial number 95 relating to 'Emission Limits for new diesel engine up to 800 kW for generator set (Genset) application’,— (a) in the opening paragraph, for the words, figures and letters ‘1st January, 2015’, the words, figures and letters ‘1st May, 2015’ shall be substituted; (b) in the General Conditions, in paragraph 2 relating to ‘Requirement of Certification’,— (i) for the figures, letters and word “1st January, 2015”, the figures, letters and word “1st May, 2015” shall be substituted; (ii) for the figures, letters and word “1st January, 2016”, the figures, letters and word “1st May , 2016” shall be substituted. [F. No. Q-15017/08/2012-CPW] Dr. RASHID HASAN, Advisor Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 844(E), dated the 19th November, 1986 and subsequently amended vide notification numbers S.O. 433(E), dated the 18th April, 1987; G.S.R. 01(E), dated the 1st January, 2010; G.S.R. 215(E), dated the 15th March, 2011; G.S.R. 221(E), dated the 18th March, 2011; G.S.R. 354(E), dated the 2nd May, 2011; G.S.R. 424(E), dated the 1st June, 2011; G.S.R. 446(E), dated the 13th June, 2011; G.S.R. 152(E), dated the 16th March, 2012; G.S.R. 266(E), dated the 30th March, 2012; G.S.R. 277(E); dated the 31st March, 2012; G.S.R. 820(E), dated the 9th November, 2012; G.S.R. 176(E), dated the 18th March, 2013; G.S.R. 535(E), dated the 7th August, 2013; G.S.R. 771(E), dated the 11th December, 2013, G.S.R. 2(E), dated the 2nd January, 2014; G.S.R. 229(E), dated the 28th March, 2014; G.S.R. 262(E) dated 31st March 2014; G.S.R. 612(E) dated 28th August, 2014; G.S.R 789(E), dated 11th November, 2014; and G.S.R. 54(E), dated 23rd January, 2015.
